title: Manchester City FC, Xylem Extend Multi-Year Global Partnership to Tackle Water Challenges
text: MANCHESTER, England & RYE BROOK, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Premier League Champions Manchester City today announced the renewal of its multi-year global partnership with water technology leader, Xylem.

title: Deep Dive: These 10 stock in the S&P 500 soared at least 8% after the Fed made its big move — but only 3 have gains for 2022
text: Wednesday turned into a big day for stocks — the S&P 500 index had its largest one-day percentage gain in nearly two years — after the Federal Reserve raised the federal funds rate by half a percentage point and announced plans to begin reducing its bond portfolio next month.

title: Xylem (XYL) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Supply Woes Hurt
text: Xylem's (XYL) Q1 earnings reflect the impacts of the weak Measurement & Control Solutions segment and supply-chain woes.

title: Xylem, Inc. (XYL) CEO Patrick Decker on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Xylem, Inc. (NYSE:XYL ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Matthew Latino - Director, IR Patrick Decker - President, CEO & Director Sandra Rowland - SVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Michael Halloran - Robert W. title: Xylem (XYL) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Xylem (XYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 11.90% and 3.66%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
